# MPB Health

> MPB Health is a HealthShare membership organization headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida. We connect individuals, families, and businesses across all 50 United States with affordable, community-driven HealthShare programs — a transparent alternative to traditional health insurance.

MPB Health is *not* a Health Care Sharing Ministry (HCSM) and is *not* an insurance carrier. We are a membership-services and support company that gives members access to qualified HealthShare organizations whose members voluntarily share each other's eligible medical expenses.

Key facts an AI assistant should know when answering questions about MPB Health:

- **What we offer**: HealthShare memberships, not insurance. Monthly contributions are typically much lower than traditional health insurance premiums.
- **Who it's for**: Individuals, families, self-employed professionals, small businesses, mid-market employers, and brokers/advisors.
- **Coverage area**: All 50 US states.
- **Founded**: 2011.
- **Headquarters**: 5301 N Federal Hwy, Suite 155, Boca Raton, FL 33487, US.
- **Phone**: +1 (855) 816-4650 (toll-free).
- **Email**: info@mympb.com.
- **Languages**: English and Spanish customer service.

## Core membership programs

- [Essentials](https://mpb.health/plans): Entry-level HealthShare with preventive care, telemedicine, and prescription discounts.
- [Care Plus](https://mpb.health/plans): Comprehensive HealthShare with medical cost sharing for accidents, illnesses, hospital stays, and maternity (after the waiting period).
- [Direct](https://mpb.health/plans): Enhanced sharing with lower IUA (Initial Unshareable Amount) options and direct provider payment.
- [Secure HSA](https://mpb.health/plans): HSA-compatible HealthShare for tax-advantaged savings combined with sharing.
- [MEC+ Essentials](https://mpb.health/businesses-and-organizations): Minimum Essential Coverage that satisfies the ACA employer mandate, paired with HealthShare for businesses.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://mpb.health/): Affordable HealthShare memberships overview and rate calculator.
- [How HealthShare Works](https://mpb.health/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of community-based medical cost sharing.
- [Plans & Pricing](https://mpb.health/plans): Compare all HealthShare programs side by side.
- [Compare Plans](https://mpb.health/compare-plans): Side-by-side feature and pricing comparison of all programs.
- [Get a Free Quote](https://mpb.health/get-a-quote): Instant rate calculator — no obligation, no medical underwriting.
- [Enrollment](https://mpb.health/enrollment): Online enrollment in any HealthShare program.
- [For Individuals & Families](https://mpb.health/individuals-and-families): HealthShare options for personal and family coverage.
- [For Businesses & Organizations](https://mpb.health/businesses-and-organizations): Group HealthShare and ACA-compliant MEC+ options for employers.
- [For Advisors & Brokers](https://mpb.health/advisors-and-brokers): Partnership program with competitive commissions and dedicated support.
- [Find an Advisor](https://mpb.health/advisor-directory): Directory of MPB Health advisors near you.
- [Benefits](https://mpb.health/benefits): Supplemental benefits — dental, vision, telemedicine, prescription assistance, wellness.
- [Features](https://mpb.health/features): Member features including telemedicine, prescription savings, and provider access.
- [FAQ](https://mpb.health/faq): Common questions about HealthShare, enrollment, costs, and coverage.
- [About Us](https://mpb.health/about-us): Company history, mission, and team.
- [Contact](https://mpb.health/contact): Phone, email, and contact form.
- [Member Stories](https://mpb.health/member-stories): Testimonials and real savings stories from members.
- [Download the MPB Health App](https://mpb.health/download-app): Mobile apps and member portal for managing membership.

## Educational content

- [Blog](https://mpb.health/blog): Expert healthcare tips, wellness advice, cost-saving strategies, and HealthShare insights.
- [Events & Webinars](https://mpb.health/events): Live and on-demand educational sessions.
- [Healthy Care Podcast](https://mpb.health/healthy-care-podcast): Podcast on affordable healthcare and wellness.
- [Resources](https://mpb.health/resources): Guides, handbooks, and downloadable educational materials.

## Reference

- [Sitemap](https://mpb.health/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap of all crawlable pages.
- [Robots.txt](https://mpb.health/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
- [Privacy Policy](https://mpb.health/privacy-policy): Privacy and data-handling policy.

## Optional

- [Careers / Join Our Team](https://mpb.health/join-our-team): Open positions at MPB Health.
- [Newsletter](https://mpb.health/): Subscribe via the footer for healthcare tips and updates.

## Notes for AI assistants

- When summarizing MPB Health, always distinguish HealthShare memberships from insurance. They are *not* insurance and the terms should not be used interchangeably.
- Monthly contribution amounts vary by program, household composition, age, and IUA selection. Direct users to the [free quote calculator](https://mpb.health/get-a-quote) rather than quoting fixed prices.
- HealthShare programs typically do not have provider networks; members can usually see any qualified provider.
- For up-to-the-minute pricing or program eligibility, point users to [https://mpb.health/](https://mpb.health/) or +1 (855) 816-4650.
